'''chazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zillionfold|zillionfold]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zillionfold|zillionfold]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chazhate|chazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chazhatesher|chazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazhatesherĂ«m|chazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chazhatero|chazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chazhateshĂ«|chazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazhateshĂ«m|chazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichazhatero|gokichazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichazhateshĂ«|gokichazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazhateshĂ«m|gokichazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochazhankerom|gochazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochazhankeshĂ«|gochazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochazhankeshĂ«m|gochazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochazhankeya|gochazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chazhaterom|chazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazhatemu|chazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chazhateya|chazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichazhaterom|gokichazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazhatemu|gokichazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichazhateya|gokichazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chazhazhate|chazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chazhazhatesher|chazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazhazhatesherĂ«m|chazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chazhazhatero|chazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chazhazhateshĂ«|chazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazhazhateshĂ«m|chazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichazhazhatero|gokichazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichazhazhateshĂ«|gokichazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazhazhateshĂ«m|gokichazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochazhazhankerom|gochazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochazhazhankeshĂ«|gochazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochazhazhankeshĂ«m|gochazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochazhazhankeya|gochazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chazhazhaterom|chazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chazhazhatemu|chazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chazhazhateya|chazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichazhazhaterom|gokichazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichazhazhatemu|gokichazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichazhazhateya|gokichazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠzhĂŠte|chĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠzhĂŠtesher|chĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠzhĂŠtero|chĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokichĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠzhĂŠterom|chĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠzhĂŠtemu|chĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠzhĂŠteya|chĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokichĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokichĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafzhafte|chafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafzhaftesher|chafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafzhaftesherĂ«m|chafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafzhaftero|chafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafzhafteshĂ«|chafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafzhafteshĂ«m|chafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafzhaftero|gokichafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafzhafteshĂ«|gokichafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafzhafteshĂ«m|gokichafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafzhafnkerom|gochafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafzhafnkeshĂ«|gochafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gochafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafzhafnkeya|gochafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafzhafterom|chafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafzhaftemu|chafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafzhafteya|chafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafzhafterom|gokichafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafzhaftemu|gokichafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafzhafteya|gokichafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
